newsArray.title: Jose Mourinho makes ‘99 per cent chance’ future prediction as the ‘Special One’ reveals when he will speak with Real Madrid amid stunning Santiago Bernabeu return rumours
newsArray.description: Jose Mourinho has dropped a massive hint regarding his future following the conclusion of Benfica's season, addressing the intensifying rumours of a sensational return to Real Madrid. The Portuguese tactician admitted that while he remains under contract in Lisbon, a pivotal face-to-face meeting with the Spanish giants is already on the calendar.
creator: muhammad zaki

newsArray.title: FIFA, Iran hold talks ahead of World Cup
newsArray.description: FIFA Secretary-General Mattias Grafstrom described his Saturday meeting with the head of Iran's Football Federation (FFIRI) as "constructive" as concerns about the nation's participation in next month's World Cup have not abated.
creator: gma news online

newsArray.title: USSSA Boys Football 2026: Kyadondo SS eliminate defending Champions Buddo SS to storm semifinals
newsArray.description: Kyadondo SS have dumped out USSSA U20 Boys Football defending Champions Buddo SS, defeating them 1-0 in the quarterfinals on Sunday. Bashir Edema scored the lone goal that guided Kyadondo SS past Buddo SS, converting from the spot in the game played at Lira Town College. The goal arrived in the 32nd minute with the [...] The post USSSA Boys Football 2026: Kyadondo SS eliminate defending Champions Buddo SS to storm semifinals appeared first on Kawowo Sports .
creator: joel muyita

newsArray.title: 'We welcome you': North Korean women football team arrives in South for a rare match
newsArray.description: North Korea's Naegohyang Women's FC arrived in South Korea for the Asian Champions League semi-finals, marking the first sports delegation visit in eight years. The team will face South Korea's Suwon FC Women, with high public interest despite ongoing political tensions between the two nations.
creator: toi world desk

newsArray.title: Foot : L'équipe féminine nord-coréenne de Naegohyang pose le pied en Corée du Sud pour une rencontre historique
newsArray.description: L’équipe féminine nord-coréenne de Naegohyang est arrivée dimanche en Corée du Sud, dans le cadre des demi-finales de la Ligue des champions d’Asie, une occasion saisie par Séoul pour célébrer «la compréhension mutuelle» entre les deux pays.
creator: le figaro avec afp

newsArray.title: Coupe du monde 2026 : une rencontre « très constructive » entre la FIFA et l'Iran
newsArray.description: Le secrétaire général de la FIFA, Mattias Grafstrom, a qualifié de « constructive » sa rencontre de samedi avec le président de la Fédération iranienne (FFIRI) à quelques semaines du coup d'envoi de la Coupe du monde (11 juin -19 juillet), aux Etats-Unis, Mexique et Canada.
creator: christine thomas

newsArray.title: Απίστευτος Σερκί σταμάτησε την απονομή για να βγάλει σέλφι με τον... πρίγκιπα Γουίλιαμ (vid)
newsArray.description: Η Μάντσεστερ Σίτι κατέκτησε το FA Cup, επικρατώντας 1-0 της Τσέλσι στον τελικό και προσθέτοντας ακόμη έναν τίτλο στη φετινή της πορεία στο αγγλικό ποδόσφαιρο. Κατά τη διάρκεια της τελετής απονομής στο «Γουέμπλεϊ», όπου τα μετάλλια απονεμήθηκαν από τον πρίγκιπα της Ουαλίας, Ουίλιαμ, μια στιγμή έγινε αμέσως viral. Ο Ράιαν Σερκί τράβηξε πάνω του τα [...]
creator: τα νεα

newsArray.title: ‘You'll never see me in red’ - Chelsea legend rules out Man Utd transfer after making huge decision on future
newsArray.description: Chelsea legend Millie Bright has finally broken her silence regarding reports linking her with a controversial summer transfer to Manchester United. The former Lionesses captain has addressed the speculation head-on, delivering a defiant message to those who thought she might swap west London for the North West.
creator: donny afroni

newsArray.title: Youth in Mathare Showcase Talent and Resilience Through Grassroots Football Program
newsArray.description: NAIROBI, Kenya, May 17 – Safaricom Hook (S-Hook) has partnered with Kambi Safi Community Initiative in Mathare to support four local football teams with football kits. This initiative is part of ongoing efforts to empower and inspire young people through sports and community engagement. Kambi Safi supports the True Colours Football Team, a grassroots program [...] The post Youth in Mathare Showcase Talent and Resilience Through Grassroots Football Program appeared first on Capital Sports .
creator: capital sport
